item.title: Why I ported my TUI tools from C to Zig
item.description: I spent three years writing TUI tools in C. I’m not going back. Zig gives me everything C does — direct memory control, no runtime, single binary output — plus a build system that doesn’t make me want to quit programming.

item.title: hexplore
item.description: hexplore is the hex-viewer component extracted from a larger binary analysis tool. Drop a file on the embed above to inspect it in the browser — offset navigation, ASCII panel, and basic struct annotation.
